name: Nossa Senhora da Assunção
description: Santo Tirso bouldering area with 4 sectors: Sector Boulder, Sector Corvo, Sector Raposa, and Sector Torre de Pizza. Sombra todo o dia. Demora pra secar. Molha quando chove. Granite rock.

boulders.name: Passeio Micológico (sit start)
boulders.notes: Sit start with both hands on opposing crimps.

boulders.name: Passeio micológico (high start)
boulders.notes: Left hand on the crimp, right hand on the crystal above it.

boulders.name: Mancha negra
boulders.notes: Stand start. Unknown starting position. Warning: The start foothold rock has disappeared.

boulders.name: Passeio aplatológico
boulders.notes: Sit start with both hands on the beginning of the slopers.

boulders.name: Costas à Mesa (Pela Esquerda)
boulders.notes: Same sit start as Costas à Mesa, then exit through the left.

boulders.name: Costas à mesa
boulders.notes: Sit start, then go straight through the slab, close to the arete of Passeio aplatológico.

boulders.name: Bicep's Mu!
boulders.notes: Unknown starting position. Start at the left of the boulder then traverse all the way to the start of Passeio aplatológico.

boulders.name: Travessia Assunção Bleau
boulders.notes: Stand start at the jug. Traverse the boulder in a anti-clockwise direction, through the top, downclimb and traverse the crack to finish in the same hold.

boulders.name: Dinâmico Assunção Bleau
boulders.notes: Dyno, start with both hands from the start jug to the sloper at the top.

boulders.name: Directa
boulders.notes: Stand start from the holds at the end of the horizontal crack.

boulders.name: Jump
boulders.notes: Dyno, start with both hands on the good holds in the crack, straight to the jug at the top.

boulders.name: Lançamento
boulders.notes: Dyno, start with both hands on the holds in the crack more to the left, to a sloper in the top lip.

boulders.name: Karma
boulders.notes: Stand start with left hand on small vertical crimp and right hand on big crimp.

boulders.name: Karma (sit start)
boulders.notes: Sit start with both hands on the big crimp.

boulders.name: Travessia Direita
boulders.notes: Start at Crack and traverse right until after Chamó gato.

boulders.name: Javali adormecido
boulders.notes: This is a small traverse between Bloca and Blocada. You should climb Bloca until the upper hold (the good one, otherwise it will be a V3/V4) and after that, you should use the last crimp of the Blocada. After that, you should do the same top-out of Blocada. Remember: when you do the traverse you have good foot holds but they're obvious.

boulders.name: Easy Rider
boulders.notes: Warning: Tree on top of the boulder.

boulders.name: Lançamento Descola
boulders.notes: Start with feet in air (campus) and both hands on the crimp. FA: Júlio Braga, 2002.

boulders.name: Descola Estático
boulders.notes: Starting with right hand on the crimp, left heel hook on the big hold in the arete to the left, and left hand on the undercling below.

boulders.name: Descola (cs esquerda)
boulders.notes: Sit start, down to the left. FA: Júlio Braga, 2004.

boulders.name: Descola 21
boulders.notes: Sit start, to the right, starting in both underclings and going to the crimp above. FA: Júlio Braga, Fev 2021.

boulders.name: Descola Swing
boulders.notes: Stand start, start with left hand on the crimp and jump to get the right hand on the big bulge.

boulders.name: XL de força
boulders.notes: Warning: Rock has been burned and mostly destroyed. SS.

boulders.name: Solta-se o peido
boulders.notes: This boulder probably has a different name. It has been climbed since at least 2011 with a sit start.

boulders.name: The Ear
boulders.notes: Starts on a jug in the crack, after - move up, using crack and crimps in Ear area. Be careful - side crimp on the top left part of the boulder - playing little bit. Could be extended with sit start, but this part should be investigated little bit more. FA: Dima Chok, 8 Jun 2025.

boulders.name: Milky Way
boulders.notes: Starting with hands on good crystals - you going up to the right, by Milky Way white line of crystals up to the jug and top-out. The crux is first move - transition with left hand up to next hold. Difficult to place feet for taller people. Lot of finger-strength needed. FA: @claravincii, 8 Jun 2025.

boulders.name: Milky Way - SS
boulders.notes: Sit Start Extension for Milky Way. Same hand holds as on route The Ear, traverse to the right, and continue as Milky Way. Assigned grade 6C+, waiting for more ascents to validate. FA: Climbing Samurai.

boulders.name: Crack
boulders.notes: Risky landing zone, there is a gap between the wall and the ground so using several pads is advised to cover the gap.

boulders.name: Senhor Palaco
boulders.notes: Start with left crimp on wall face and right juggy crimp. After that just go up to crack and top-out. No arreite allowed. FA: Dima Chok & Vladyslav Liubov, 12 Jul 2025.

boulders.name: Salto de Palhaco
boulders.notes: Start same as Senhor Palhaco, but instead of going to the crack - just jump and top-out.

boulders.name: Gritos (sit start)
boulders.notes: Sit start for Gritos, down and to the right.

boulders.name: Papa Reformas
boulders.notes: Sit start with both hands on the crimp below at the left side of the boulder.
